message:
fix(search): Force initial reload on Manual policy index reader

Add explicit reload() call after opening an index reader with Manual
reload policy. Without this, the reader starts with a stale view and
won't see segments committed before we opened it.

This fixes a race condition where:
1. Index writer commits new segments
2. Reader opens with Manual policy (gets stale snapshot)
3. Search misses recently indexed documents

Also fix pagination test to use unique document content, preventing
false test failures due to deduplication logic removing identical docs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
